name: Cheri Berry
description:
Cures being paralyzed. Disappears for the duration of
the battle after a single use.
official_desc:
Cures being paralyzed. Disappears for the duration of
the battle after a single use.
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder cures itself if it is paralyzed. Single use.

name: Chesto Berry
description:
Cures being asleep. Disappears for the duration of the
battle after a single use.
official_desc:
Cures being asleep. Disappears for the duration of the
battle after a single use.
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder wakes up if it is asleep. Single use.

name: Pecha Berry
description:
Cures being poisoned or badly poisoned. Disappears for
the duration of the battle after a single use.
official_desc:
Cures being poisoned or badly poisoned. Disappears for
the duration of the battle after a single use.
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder is cured if it is poisoned. Single use.

name: Rawst Berry
description:
Cures being burned. Disappears for the duration of the

official_desc:
Cures being burned. Disappears for the duration of the

pkmn_shortDesc: Holder is cured if it is burned. Single use.

official_desc:
Cures being frozen. Disappears for the duration of the

pkmn_shortDesc: Holder is cured if it is frozen. Single use.

name: Leppa Berry
description:
Restores 10 PP to a move when its PP is fully depleted.
Disappears for the duration of the battle after a single use.
official_desc:
Restores 10 PP to a move when its PP is fully depleted.
Disappears for the duration of the battle after a single use.
pkmn_shortDesc: Restores 10 PP to the first of the holder's moves to reach 0 PP. Single use.

name: Oran Berry
description:
Restores 10 HP to the holder when its HP drops to 1/2
or less of its max. Disappears for the duration of the
battle after a single use.
official_desc:
Restores 10 HP to the holder when its HP drops to 1/2
or less of its max. Disappears for the duration of the
battle after a single use.
pkmn_shortDesc: Restores 10 HP when at 1/2 max HP or less. Single use.

official_desc:
Cures being confused. Disappears for the duration of the

pkmn_shortDesc: Holder is cured if it is confused. Single use.

name: Lum Berry
description:
Cures any status condition or confusion. Disappears for
the duration of the battle after a single use.
official_desc:
Cures any status condition or confusion. Disappears for
the duration of the battle after a single use.
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder cures itself if it has a non-volatile status or is confused. Single use.

name: Sitrus Berry
description:
Restores 1/4 of the holder’s max HP when the holder’s
HP drops to 1/2 or less of its max. Disappears for the
duration of the battle after a single use.
official_desc:
Restores 1/4 of the holder’s max HP when the holder’s
HP drops to 1/2 or less of its max. Disappears for the
duration of the battle after a single use.
pkmn_shortDesc: Restores 1/4 max HP when at 1/2 max HP or less. Single use.

name: Bright Powder
description:
Lowers the accuracy of moves used by opponents
against the holder by 10%.
official_desc:
Lowers the accuracy of moves used by opponents
against the holder by 10%.
pkmn_shortDesc: The accuracy of attacks against the holder is 0.9x.

name: White Herb
description:
Restores the holder’s stats to their usual value when they
are lowered. Disappears for the duration of the battle
after a single use.
official_desc:
Restores the holder’s stats to their usual value when they
are lowered. Disappears for the duration of the battle
after a single use.
pkmn_shortDesc: Restores all lowered stat stages to 0 when one is less than 0. Single use.

name: Quick Claw
description:
Gives the holder’s moves a 20% chance of going first
among moves of the same priority.
official_desc:
Gives the holder’s moves a 20% chance of going first
among moves of the same priority.
pkmn_shortDesc: Each turn, holder has a 20% chance to move first in its priority bracket.

name: Mental Herb
description:
Cures the holder of the Infatuated, Taunted, Unable to
Repeat, Move Disabled, Healing Prevented, and Encore
statuses. Disappears for the duration of the battle after a
single use.
official_desc:
Cures the holder of the Infatuated, Taunted, Unable to
Repeat, Move Disabled, Healing Prevented, and Encore
statuses. Disappears for the duration of the battle after a
single use.
pkmn_shortDesc: Cures holder of Attract, Disable, Encore, Heal Block, Taunt, Torment. Single use.

name: King’s Rock
description:
When the holder deals damage with its moves, there is a
10% chance that targets will flinch.
official_desc:
When the holder deals damage with its moves, there is a
10% chance that targets will flinch.
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder's attacks without a chance to flinch gain a 10% chance to flinch.
pkmn_desc: Holder's attacks without a chance to make the target flinch gain a 10% chance to make the target flinch. Evolves Poliwhirl into Politoed and Slowpoke into Slowking when traded.

name: Silver Powder
description:
Boosts the power of the holder’s Bug-type moves
by 20%.
official_desc:
Boosts the power of the holder’s Bug-type moves
by 20%.
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder's Bug-type attacks have 1.2x power.

name: Focus Band
description:
If the holder takes damage from a move that would
knock it out, there’s a 10% chance the holder will
endure the hit with 1 HP.
official_desc:
If the holder takes damage from a move that would
knock it out, there’s a 10% chance the holder will
endure the hit with 1 HP.
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder has a 10% chance to survive an attack that would KO it with 1 HP.

name: Scope Lens
description: Gives the holder a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.
official_desc: Gives the holder a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder's critical hit ratio is raised by 1 stage.

name: Metal Coat
description:
Boosts the power of the holder’s Steel-type moves
by 20%.
official_desc:
Boosts the power of the holder’s Steel-type moves
by 20%.
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder's Steel-type attacks have 1.2x power.
pkmn_desc: Holder's Steel-type attacks have 1.2x power. Evolves Onix into Steelix and Scyther into Scizor when traded.

name: Leftovers
description:
Restores 1/16 of the holder’s max HP at the end of
every turn.
official_desc:
Restores 1/16 of the holder’s max HP at the end of
every turn.
pkmn_shortDesc: At the end of every turn, holder restores 1/16 of its max HP.

name: Light Ball
description:
When held by a Pikachu, doubles the holder’s Attack
and Sp. Atk.
official_desc:
When held by a Pikachu, doubles the holder’s Attack
and Sp. Atk.
pkmn_shortDesc: If held by a Pikachu, its Attack and Sp. Atk are doubled.

description:
Boosts the power of the holder’s Ground-type moves

official_desc:

pkmn_shortDesc: Holder's Ground-type attacks have 1.2x power.

name: Shell Bell
description:
When the holder deals damage with its moves, its HP is
restored by 1/8 of the damage dealt.
official_desc:
When the holder deals damage with its moves, its HP is
restored by 1/8 of the damage dealt.
pkmn_shortDesc: After an attack, holder gains 1/8 of the damage in HP dealt to other Pokemon.

name: Wide Lens
description: Boosts the accuracy of the holder’s moves by 10%.
official_desc: Boosts the accuracy of the holder’s moves by 10%.
pkmn_shortDesc: The accuracy of attacks by the holder is 1.1x.

name: Muscle Band
description: Boosts the power of the holder’s physical moves by 10%.
official_desc: Boosts the power of the holder’s physical moves by 10%.
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder's physical attacks have 1.1x power.

name: Wise Glasses
description: Boosts the power of the holder’s special moves by 10%.
official_desc: Boosts the power of the holder’s special moves by 10%.
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder's special attacks have 1.1x power.

name: Expert Belt
description:
Boosts the power of the holder’s supereffective moves
by 20%.
official_desc:
Boosts the power of the holder’s supereffective moves
by 20%.
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder's attacks that are super effective against the target do 1.2x damage.

name: Light Clay
description:
When the holder uses Light Screen, Reflect, or
Aurora Veil, the duration is extended by 3 turns.
(Total duration: 8 turns)
official_desc:
When the holder uses Light Screen, Reflect, or
Aurora Veil, the duration is extended by 3 turns.
(Total duration: 8 turns)
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder's use of Aurora Veil, Light Screen, or Reflect lasts 8 turns instead of 5.

name: Life Orb
description:
Boosts the power of the holder’s moves by 30%.
However, the holder also loses 1/10 of its max HP
each time it successfully lands an attack.
official_desc:
Boosts the power of the holder’s moves by 30%.
However, the holder also loses 1/10 of its max HP
each time it successfully lands an attack.
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder's attacks do 1.3x damage, and it loses 1/10 its max HP after the attack.

name: Focus Sash
description:
If the holder has full HP and takes damage from a move
that would knock it out in one hit, it will endure the hit
with 1 HP. Disappears for the duration of the battle after
a single use.
official_desc:
If the holder has full HP and takes damage from a move
that would knock it out in one hit, it will endure the hit
with 1 HP. Disappears for the duration of the battle after
a single use.
pkmn_shortDesc: If holder's HP is full, will survive an attack that would KO it with 1 HP. Single use.

name: Zoom Lens
description:
Boosts the accuracy of the holder’s moves by 20% when
the holder acts after the targets.
official_desc:
Boosts the accuracy of the holder’s moves by 20% when
the holder acts after the targets.
pkmn_shortDesc: The accuracy of attacks by the holder is 1.2x if it moves after its target.

name: Metronome
description:
Boosts the power of a move that is used repeatedly.
This boost will be 20% on the second usage, 40% on
the third, and so on, up to a maximum boost of 100%.
If the streak is broken, the move’s power returns to its
usual value.
official_desc:
Boosts the power of a move that is used repeatedly.
This boost will be 20% on the second usage, 40% on
the third, and so on, up to a maximum boost of 100%.
If the streak is broken, the move’s power returns to its
usual value.
pkmn_shortDesc: Damage of moves used on consecutive turns is increased. Max 2x after 5 turns.

name: Iron Ball
description:
Halves the holder’s Speed stat. If the holder is off the
ground, it will be grounded, meaning it can be affected
by Ground-type moves, as well as the Spikes, Toxic
Spikes, and Sticky Web statuses.
official_desc:
Halves the holder’s Speed stat. If the holder is off the
ground, it will be grounded, meaning it can be affected
by Ground-type moves, as well as the Spikes, Toxic
Spikes, and Sticky Web statuses.
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder is grounded, Speed halved. If Flying type, takes neutral Ground damage.

name: Icy Rock
description:
When the holder summons snow with its moves or
Ability, the duration is extended by 3 turns.
(Total duration: 8 turns)
official_desc:
When the holder summons snow with its moves or
Ability, the duration is extended by 3 turns.
(Total duration: 8 turns)
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder's use of Snowscape lasts 8 turns instead of 5.

name: Smooth Rock
description:
When the holder summons a sandstorm with its moves
or Ability, the duration is extended by 3 turns.
(Total duration: 8 turns)
official_desc:
When the holder summons a sandstorm with its moves
or Ability, the duration is extended by 3 turns.
(Total duration: 8 turns)
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder's use of Sandstorm lasts 8 turns instead of 5.

name: Heat Rock
description:
When the holder summons harsh sunlight with its moves
or Ability, the duration is extended by 3 turns.
(Total duration: 8 turns)
official_desc:
When the holder summons harsh sunlight with its moves
or Ability, the duration is extended by 3 turns.
(Total duration: 8 turns)
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder's use of Sunny Day lasts 8 turns instead of 5.

name: Damp Rock
description:
When the holder summons rain with its moves or
Ability, the duration is extended by 3 turns.
(Total duration: 8 turns)
official_desc:
When the holder summons rain with its moves or
Ability, the duration is extended by 3 turns.
(Total duration: 8 turns)
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder's use of Rain Dance lasts 8 turns instead of 5.

name: Choice Scarf
description:
Boosts the holder’s Speed stat by 50%. However, once
the holder uses a move, it becomes unable to use any
other move but that one until it switches out of battle.
official_desc:
Boosts the holder’s Speed stat by 50%. However, once
the holder uses a move, it becomes unable to use any
other move but that one until it switches out of battle.
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder's Speed is 1.5x, but it can only select the first move it executes.

name: Shed Shell
description:
Enables the holder to ignore any effects that would
usually prevent it from switching out of battle and being
replaced by another party Pokémon.
official_desc:
Enables the holder to ignore any effects that would
usually prevent it from switching out of battle and being
replaced by another party Pokémon.
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder cannot be prevented from choosing to switch out by any effect.

name: Big Root
description:
Boosts the amount of HP restored through HP-absorbing
moves by 30%. HP restored by moves such as Ingrain
and Strength Sap will also be boosted by 30%.
official_desc:
Boosts the amount of HP restored through HP-absorbing
moves by 30%. HP restored by moves such as Ingrain
and Strength Sap will also be boosted by 30%.
pkmn_shortDesc: Holder gains 1.3x HP from draining/Aqua Ring/Ingrain/Leech Seed/Strength Sap.

name: Gengarite
description: A held item that allows Gengar to Mega Evolve.
official_desc: A held item that allows Gengar to Mega Evolve.
pkmn_shortDesc: If held by a Gengar, this item allows it to Mega Evolve in battle.

name: Gardevoirite
description: A held item that allows Gardevoir to Mega Evolve.
official_desc: A held item that allows Gardevoir to Mega Evolve.
pkmn_shortDesc: If held by a Gardevoir, this item allows it to Mega Evolve in battle.

name: Ampharosite
description: A held item that allows Ampharos to Mega Evolve.
official_desc: A held item that allows Ampharos to Mega Evolve.
pkmn_shortDesc: If held by an Ampharos, this item allows it to Mega Evolve in battle.

name: Venusaurite
description: A held item that allows Venusaur to Mega Evolve.
official_desc: A held item that allows Venusaur to Mega Evolve.
pkmn_shortDesc: If held by a Venusaur, this item allows it to Mega Evolve in battle.

name: Charizardite X
description:
A held item that allows Charizard to Mega Evolve into
Mega Charizard X.
official_desc:
A held item that allows Charizard to Mega Evolve into
Mega Charizard X.
pkmn_shortDesc: If held by a Charizard, this item allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Charizard X.

name: Blastoisinite
description: A held item that allows Blastoise to Mega Evolve.
official_desc: A held item that allows Blastoise to Mega Evolve.
pkmn_shortDesc: If held by a Blastoise, this item allows it to Mega Evolve in battle.

name: Blazikenite
description: A held item that allows Blaziken to Mega Evolve.
official_desc: A held item that allows Blaziken to Mega Evolve.
pkmn_shortDesc: If held by a Blaziken, this item allows it to Mega Evolve in battle.

name: Medichamite
